title: Collect. Trade. Calibrate.
description: Helix rewards precision — stock your binder from sealed bundles and open listings, pass along duplicates for credits, and shape a deck that wins cleanly.

features.title: Grow Your Binder
features.description: Add depth across domains and seasonal releases. Every new pull opens another line you can run when the ladder shifts.

features.title: Precise Shopping
features.description: Filter the catalog, find the missing Frame, and buy exactly what your curve has been waiting for — clean signal, no noise.

features.title: Open Sealed Bundles
features.description: Crack sealed products and chase a standout pull. Each unopened bundle is a small surprise — chase card or trade bait.

features.title: Chase Prime Prints
features.description: Hunt foils, Singularity Frames, and signature prints — the kind of card that rewrites a deck and makes opponents pause.

features.title: Pass Along Duplicates
features.description: Extras still have value. List them, fund the next upgrade, and keep your binder lean for the decks you actually play.

features.title: Tune Your Deck
features.description: Prototype lists in the deck lab — test counters, stress synergies, and lock a 30-card answer to the ladder's current pace.

tiers.title: Everyday Frames
tiers.description: Reliable units and utility pieces that glue a list together — flexible enough to slot into multiple strategies.

tiers.title: Lab Prints
tiers.description: Standout prints with real board presence — alternate art, foil shine, and effects that reward thoughtful building.

tiers.title: Spire Guardians
tiers.description: High-impact Frames and engines that can close a match with precision. One well-timed play can settle the board.

marketCta.description: Hundreds of listings live right now — find the Frame that completes your next deck.
